TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hbun-tunan, title = Hbun-tunan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hbun-tunan} }

S.FORM: alang Hbun-tunan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 105 buwan, 318 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 295 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 23 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 84%, Amis 2%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-tunan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun-tunan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-tunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-tunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-tunan hya' ga Thyakan. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-tunan hya' ga Kin lwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Hbun-tunan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 105 buwan, 318 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 295 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 23 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 84%, Amis 2%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-tunan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun-tunan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-tunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-tunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-tunan hya' ga Thyakan. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-tunan hya' ga Kin lwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun-tunan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun-tunan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħβun-tunan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-tunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-tunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-tunan ħjaʔ ɣa tħjakan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-tunan ħjaʔ ɣa kin lwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
